## Agents

Agents are LLM-powered personas, each with their own identity, permissions,
and context. They decide which plugins to invoke based on user requests.

| Agent | Status |
|-------|--------|
| 🐙 **main** | ✅ Active |
| 📬 **mail** | 💤 Inactive |
| 🔑 **root** | 💤 Inactive |

### 🐙 main

The primary personal assistant agent. Handles day-to-day requests — home automation, email, calendar, restaurants, and more. Has access to all configured plugins and routes tasks to specialist agents when appropriate.

### 📬 mail

A dedicated mail-processing agent. Handles incoming email events surfaced by the `fastmail-sse` service and manages mail-specific workflows independently of the main conversation context.

### 🔑 root

A privileged agent with elevated permissions. Not invoked directly by users — only called explicitly by `main` when a task requires capabilities beyond the standard permission set.

---

## Channels

Channels are the messaging platforms through which users interact with agents.

| Platform | Status |
|----------|--------|
| 💬 Telegram | ✅ Enabled |
| 🎮 Discord | ✅ Enabled |

Octo listens for messages on both Telegram and Discord. Either channel can be used to send requests, and notifications (such as incoming email alerts from `fastmail-sse`) are delivered back through whichever channel is active.
